arguments.content:
# Weekly API Health Summary Report

**Report Period:** April 9, 2026 – April 15, 2026  
**Generated At:** 2026-04-15T09:15:00+08:00

---

## Availability

| Metric | Value | Status |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Overall Uptime | 99.7% | ✅ Meeting SLO |
| Planned Maintenance | 0 minutes | — |
| Unplanned Downtime | 30 minutes | ⚠️ Minor incident on Apr 12 |

**SLO Target:** 99.5% | **Current Compliance:** ✅ PASS

---

## Error Rates

| Metric | This Week | Last Week | Trend |
|--------|-----------|-----------|-------|
| Average Error Rate | 0.35% | 0.41% | ↓ Improving |
| 5xx Errors | 0.12% | 0.18% | ↓ Improving |
| 4xx Errors | 0.23% | 0.23% | → Stable |

**SLO Target:** < 1.0% | **Current Compliance:** ✅ PASS

---

## Response Times

| Percentile | Value | Status |
|------------|-------|--------|
| P50 (Median) | 118 ms | ✅ Good |
| P95 | 238 ms | ✅ Good |
| P99 | 395 ms | ✅ Good |
| Max | 1,240 ms | ⚠️ Spike during incident |

**SLO Target:** P95 < 300ms | **Current Compliance:** ✅ PASS

---

## Notable Incidents

### INC-2026-0412: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
- **Date:** 2026-04-12 14:23 UTC
- **Duration:** 30 minutes
- **Impact:** Elevated latency (P99 > 1s), 0.5% error rate spike
- **Root Cause:** Connection pool misconfiguration after deployment
- **Resolution:** Increased pool size from 50 to 100 connections
- **Follow-up:** Monitoring alert added for pool utilization > 80%

---

## Summary

Overall API health remains **GOOD** this week. All SLOs are being met despite the minor incident on April 12. Error rates continue to trend downward, and response times remain well within targets.

**Action Items:**
- [ ] Review connection pool settings across all services
- [ ] Update runbooks with new alerting thresholds

---

*Report generated by Orion Tech Backend Team*
